title: Paul Cook (rugby league)
extract: Paul Cook (born 23 July 1976) is an English former professional rugby league footballer and coach. He represented England at the 1995 Rugby League World Cup, and played at club level for Leeds, Bradford Bulls and Huddersfield Giants, as a fullback, wing, centre or stand-off. and has coached at amateur level at Milford Marlins and Bramley Buffaloes.
